news_title: Senmiao Technology Limited Announces 1-for-10 Reverse Stock Split
summary: Senmiao Technology (Nasdaq: AIHS)announced a1-for-10 reverse stock spliteffective July 29, 2025. The company's common stock will continue trading on Nasdaq under the same symbol with a new CUSIP number 817225303.Following the split, every 10 shares of issued and outstanding common stock will automatically convert to one share, with fractional shares rounded up. The company will also reduce its authorized shares from500 million to 50 million. The reverse split was approved by the Board of Directors and requires no stockholder approval under Nevada law.
